zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Knoxville於1246年4月6日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾阿其時，她的父親Sir Bewes L de Knoville27歲，母親Joan de la Hyde17歲。她於1259年與Reginald ab Adam在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1311年在英國格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Knoxville于1246年4月6日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾阿其时，她的父亲Sir Bewes L de Knoville27岁，母亲Joan de la Hyde17岁。她于1259年与Reginald ab Adam在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1311年在英国格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Knoxville was born on 6 April 1246, in Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, was 27 and her mother, Joan de la Hyde, was 17. She married Reginald ab Adam in 1259, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1311, in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Knoxville est née le 6 avril 1246, à Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Hyde, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald ab Adam en 1259, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1311, à Charlton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Knoxville am 6. April 1246 in Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bewes L de Knoville 27 und ihre Mutter Joan de la Hyde 17. Sie hat 1259 in Gloucestershire, England Reginald ab Adam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1311 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Charlton, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Knoxville è nata il il 6 aprile 1246 nel Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan de la Hyde, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Reginald ab Adam nel 1259, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1311, nel Charlton, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Knoxvilleが1246年4月6日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアシュチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir Bewes L de Knovilleは27歳，母Joan de la Hydeは17歳であった。1259年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでReginald ab Adamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1311年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャールトンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Knoxville(이)가 1246년 4월 6일 영국 그루스스터실르 애스hc후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bewes L de Knoville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de la Hyde(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Reginald ab Adam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 영국 그루스스터실르 찰턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Knoxville nasceu em 6 de abril de 1246, em Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Hyde, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald ab Adam em 1259, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1311, em Charlton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Knoxville родилась 6 апреля 1246 г. в местности ащурч, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bewes L de Knoville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Hyde, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald ab Adam в 1259 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1311 г. в местности чарлтон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan De Knoxville nació el 6 de abril de 1246, en Ashchurch, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan de la Hyde, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Reginald ab Adam en 1259, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1311, en Charlton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
